title: dactylis glomerata var. abbreviata
intro: Dactylis glomerata var. abbreviata, also known as the short-coated cock's foot grass, is a variety of the Dactylis glomerata plant, a type of grass native to Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dactylis glomerata var. abbreviata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support digestive health, among others. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
